name: Singapore MRT/LRT and bus adult fares (Dec 2025)

claims.claim_text: Singapore adult trunk bus card fare up to 3.2 km

sources.title: SimplyGo — Adult Public Transport Fares
sources.note: Official adult fare table updated 27 December 2025 lists trunk service card fare up to 3.2 km as 128 cents.

verification_event.note: Read directly from SimplyGo / TransitLink official fare page on 2026-06-29. Final human approval pending.
